subject: Charged twice for my subscription
message: Hi team, I was charged twice this month for the same subscription. Please fix this as soon as possible and let me know when the refund will be processed.

subject: Cannot log into my account
message: I have tried resetting my password three times but I still cannot access my account. I need access urgently because I use this for work.

subject: Feature request for reporting dashboard
message: It would be very useful if the reporting dashboard could export charts directly to PowerPoint. This would help our team a lot.

subject: App keeps crashing on startup
message: The desktop app crashes every time I open it after the latest update. Please investigate.

subject: Very unhappy with support response
message: I waited four days for a reply and still did not get a clear answer. This is extremely frustrating and I want this escalated.
